props.ChoiceText: Alone in prayer, you saw something that left the room too small when dawn came.
props.ChoiceBio: A vision in solitude left you with more urgency than certainty.

0.TransitionText: Because a vision in solitude left you with more urgency than certainty, you were drawn into half-hidden remedies and village mysteries.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Cunning Folk, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a vision in solitude left you with more urgency than certainty, duty and doctrine bound you more tightly to religious service.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Religious, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a vision in solitude left you with more urgency than certainty, devotion opened onto mysteries your superiors would never have called safe.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Occultist, but you may remain on your current path instead.
